items.title: Artemis crew home safely after completing historic mission to the Moon
items.summary: Four astronauts splashed down in the Pacific after a nine-day voyage that took them further from Earth than any humans.

items.title: Final push for votes as challenger to Hungary's Orbán senses victory
items.summary: As Péter Magyar's opposition movement leads in the polls, tens of thousands of anti-Orbán supporters fill Heroes' Square in Budapest.

items.title: Frontrunner for California governor denies sexual assault allegations
items.summary: The Democratic congressman, a leading candidate in the race, has strongly denied the accusations saying he will fight with "facts".

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 談判前伊朗開嗆   若著重以色列利益「就沒協議」
items.summary: 美國和伊朗11日在巴基斯坦談判，雙方直接談判前都有強硬言論，美國總統川普發文指伊朗「沒有牌」；伊朗官員則警告，若談判採以色列利益優先，就不會有協議。  率領伊朗談判團的國會...…

items.title: 美、伊談判會前會   伊朗定下「紅線」曝光
items.summary: 美國和伊朗的談判11日在巴基斯坦登場前，雙方談判團隊先分別與巴國總理夏立夫（Shehbaz Sharif）會談。據悉伊朗已將談判條件交給巴國，當中定出幾條「紅線」，包括戰爭賠償...…

items.title: 伊朗最高領袖遲無聲影  核心圈人士：重傷毀容但仍可決策
items.summary: 伊朗新任最高領袖穆吉塔巴（Mojtaba Khamenei）遲未露面，僅發出書面聲明，引起各方揣測。《路透》11日報導引述3名接近穆吉塔巴核心圈人士說法，穆吉塔巴在開戰當天的空...…
